page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.90xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 360 dedicated Intel Xeon 8490H physical cores operating at a base clock speed of 1.9 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 360 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 6144.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 17.07 GB of RAM per core. This high memory-to-CPU ratio positions the instance for memory-intensive workloads. It does not include local NVMe storage or onboard GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 96 Gbps.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.re8.90xlarge represents a high-density resource allocation designed to consolidate massive enterprise workloads onto a single node. The absence of local storage and GPUs represents a clear tradeoff, focusing the hardware profile entirely on memory capacity and raw CPU core count. This configuration is suited for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and massive data analytics pipelines that require substantial RAM without GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.90xlarge is a memory-optimized instance designed for large-scale enterprise workloads. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, it features 360 dedicated Intel Xeon 8490H physical cores running at 1.9 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance provides 6144.0 GB of system memory, delivering 17.07 GB of RAM per core, which is suitable for memory-intensive applications. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage solutions. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 96 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for consolidating massive databases, in-memory computing, and large-scale data processing tasks that require extensive memory capacity and high core counts without the need for hardware acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.90xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 360 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 6144 GB of RAM, and 96 Gbps network bandwidth for large-scale in-memory databases.

6144.0 GB of system memory providing 17.07 GB of RAM per core.

Designed for massive in-memory databases and enterprise data processing.
